name: Media Player Now Playing
description: Displays the poster of the currently playing video from Plex, Jellyfin, or Emby. Use as a now-playing interrupt source to pre-empt gallery content whenever a video is active.
author: Ryan Lane

backend.title: Media Server
backend.description: Which media server to connect to

server_url.title: Server URL
server_url.description: Full URL including port, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:32400 (Plex) or http://192.168.1.10:8096 (Jellyfin/Emby)

api_token.title: API Token / Key
api_token.description: Plex token (found in Plex Web → Account → Authorized Devices) or Jellyfin/Emby API key

username.title: Username Filter
username.description: Only track sessions from this user (leave blank to show any active session)

verify_ssl.title: Verify SSL Certificate
verify_ssl.description: Disable for servers with self-signed certificates on local networks

fit_mode.title: Poster Fit
fit_mode.description: crop = fill display (may trim edges); letterbox = show full poster with black bars

show_info.title: Show Title Overlay
show_info.description: Display the title, series, and year in a bar at the bottom of the poster

theme.title: Overlay Theme
theme.description: Color scheme for the title overlay bar
